user.title: Climate Conductor
user.description: Combine several climate entities in one room into a single thermostat.

data.name: Name
data.temperature_sensor: Room temperature source (sensor or thermostat, optional)
data.humidity_sensor: Room humidity source (sensor or thermostat, optional)

data_description.hide_members: Removes the individual devices from dashboards and from the thermostat's pop-up controls.
data_description.name: Shown as the thermostat's name. Defaults to Thermostat.
data_description.area: The thermostat is placed in this area, and its entity ID is generated from the area and name.

routes.title: Assign modes to devices
routes.description: More than one device can serve these modes — choose which one handles each.

error.member_already_claimed: One or more selected thermostats already belong to another Climate Conductor.
